title: berkheya jardineana
intro: Berkheya jardineana, also known as the Golden Burr or Jardine's daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, Berkheya jardineana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
